name: Export False-Color Publication Figure with Scale Bar
description: Prepare a publication-ready figure of the Eagle Nebula using the FITS image at /opt/fits_samples/eagle_nebula/656nmos.fits. Calibrate the spatial scale to 0.1 arcsec/pixel. Adjust the image for clarity, convert it to 8-bit, and apply the 'Fire' false-color Look-Up Table. Include a 30-arcsecond white scale bar in the lower right corner. Export the final image as a PNG to ~/AstroImages/publication/eagle_figure.png.
